# Alembic Migrations

Alembic manages schema migrations for SQLAlchemy-based projects.

## File naming

Alembic generates revision IDs automatically. Keep the message descriptive:

```
alembic revision --autogenerate -m "add_users_table"
```

## Commands

```bash
# Generate a new migration (autogenerate from model changes)
alembic revision --autogenerate -m "description"

# Apply pending migrations
alembic upgrade head

# Rollback one step
alembic downgrade -1

# View history
alembic history

# Check current version
alembic current
```

## Conventions

- Always review autogenerated migrations before committing.
- Add manual `upgrade()` and `downgrade()` logic for data migrations.
- Test both `upgrade head` and `downgrade -1` before committing.
